subject: Can we add more user seats?
body: Our team has expanded to 50 people, and the current 20-user license is not enough. How do we expand?

subject: Interested in the data analytics module
body: We read about your data analytics module and would like to learn about pricing and features. We currently only use the basic plan.

subject: Want to deploy for branch offices too
body: Headquarters has been working well. We want to deploy for our New York and Chicago branch offices too. What plan options are available?
